message:
chore(beads): Close meta_skill SUB-EPIC

- bd-1ega.2: Add meta_skill (ms) to ACFS - CLOSED
- bd-1ega.2.9: Create unit tests for ms - CLOSED

All three flywheel tool SUB-EPICs (wa, brenner_bot, ms) are now complete.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -768,7 +768,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-1ega.15","title":"Update CHANGELOG with new tools and version bump","description":"## Task

Update CHANGELOG.md and VERSION file for new tool release.

## CHANGELOG Entry

```markdown
## [X.Y.Z] - YYYY-MM-DD

### Added
- beads_rust (br) - Rust port of issue tracker, replaces golang beads
  - bd alias maintained for backward compatibility
- meta_skill (ms) - Knowledge management and skill distribution
- remote_compilation_helper (rch) - Build acceleration for agent swarms
- wezterm_automata (wa) - Multi-agent orchestration via WezTerm
- brenner_bot - Research session CLI and orchestration

### Utilities Added
- toon_rust (tru), rust_proxy, rano, xf, markdown_web_browser (mdwb)
- process_triage (pt), aadc, source_to_prompt_tui (s2p)
- coding_agent_usage_tracker (caut)

### Changed
- Replaced golang beads (bd) with beads_rust (br)
- bd command now aliases to br for compatibility

### Deprecated
- golang beads (bd) - use br instead
```

## VERSION File

Bump version appropriately (likely minor version for new features).

## Acceptance Criteria

1. CHANGELOG accurately describes all changes
2. VERSION file updated
3. No breaking changes undocumented","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:02:07.720473075Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:02:07.720473075Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["changelog","docs","version"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1ega.15","depends_on_id":"bd-1ega","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:02:07.720473075Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1ega.15","depends_on_id":"bd-1ega.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:02:07.720473075Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1ega.16","title":"Validate install.sh changes with shellcheck and dry-run","description":"## Task

Validate the updated install.sh script before deployment.

## Validation Steps

### 1. Static Analysis
```bash
shellcheck install.sh
shellcheck scripts/lib/*.sh
shellcheck scripts/generated/*.sh
```

### 2. Syntax Check
```bash
bash -n install.sh
```

### 3. Dry-Run Test
```bash
# Test installation logic without actually installing
./install.sh --dry-run --yes
```

### 4. Phase-by-Phase Validation
```bash
# Run individual phases to verify
./install.sh --phase 9 --dry-run  # Dicklesworthstone stack
```

## Logging

All validation output should go to:
/tmp/install_validation_TIMESTAMP.log

## Acceptance Criteria

1. shellcheck passes with no errors
2. bash -n shows no syntax errors
3. Dry-run completes without failures
4. All new tools appear in dry-run output
5. No regressions in existing tool installation","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:08:54.023850195Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:08:54.023850195Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["installer","shellcheck","validation"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1ega.16","depends_on_id":"bd-1ega","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:08:54.023850195Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1ega.16","depends_on_id":"bd-1ega.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:08:54.023850195Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1ega.17","title":"Audit and create install.sh scripts for tools missing them","description":"## Task

Audit all new tool repos to verify they have install.sh scripts.
For any missing scripts, create them or document alternative installation.

## Tools to Audit

Check /dp/ repos for:
1. meta_skill - has install.sh?
2. beads_rust - has install.sh?
3. remote_compilation_helper - has install.sh?
4. wezterm_automata - has install.sh?
5. brenner_bot - has install.sh?
6. All utilities

## For Missing install.sh

Either:
1. Create install.sh in the tool repo, OR
2. Add inline installation to ACFS installer

## install.sh Template

```bash
#\!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# Check for required build tools
command -v cargo >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'Requires rust/cargo'; exit 1; }

# Build and install
cargo install --path . --locked

# Verify
command -v TOOL_BINARY >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'Installation failed'; exit 1; }

echo 'Successfully installed TOOL_NAME'
```

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Every tool has installation path identified
2. install.sh exists or alternative documented
3. checksums.yaml can be populated","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:09:45.704315215Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:09:45.704315215Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["audit","installer"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1ega.17","depends_on_id":"bd-1ega","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:09:45.704315215Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

```yaml
    description: Knowledge management and skill distribution for AI coding agents
    website: https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/meta_skill
```

 {"id":"bd-1ega.2.3","title":"Add meta_skill health check to doctor.sh","description":"## Task

Add check_meta_skill_status() function to scripts/lib/doctor.sh.

## Implementation

```bash
check_meta_skill_status() {
  if command -v ms >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    local version
    version=$(ms --version 2>&1 | head -1)
    log_success "meta_skill: $version"
    return 0
  else
    log_warn "meta_skill (ms) not installed"
    return 1
  fi
}
```

## Acceptance Criteria

1. acfs doctor checks for ms command
2. Shows version when installed
3.
